Reading.description: One time-stamped sample of a single metric.

value.description: The sampled value. Units are the metric's RFC-007 units.

Metric.description: Closed set of measured/derived quantities (RFC-007). soil_moisture is zone-scoped; house-level metrics carry zone_id null.

TelemetrySeries.description: One historical sensor series for a greenhouse over the requested window. zone_id preserves per-zone identity for soil-moisture series; house-level metrics use null.

zone_id.description: Zone identity for zone-scoped series, or null for greenhouse-scoped metrics.

readings.description: Samples for this metric/scope pair, ordered by timestamp.

ActuatorState.description: A time-stamped actuator sample: commanded vs observed position. Position is a 0-100 number: variable/modulating actuators report their level; pure on/off devices report 0 (off) or 100 (on).

zone_id.description: Zone identity for per-zone actuators such as irrigation_valve, or null for house-level actuators.

commanded.description: Commanded position/level for this sample (0-100; on/off devices use 0=off, 100=on).

observed.description: Observed readback position (0-100), or null when unavailable.

TelemetryRange.description: Historical telemetry for one greenhouse over a [from, to] window: the seed the SPA caches and merges with the live WebSocket edge. Metrics match the controller's published surface, including per-zone soil moisture and actuator positions.

from.description: Start of the returned window (RFC 3339 UTC, ms).

to.description: End of the returned window (RFC 3339 UTC, ms).

series.description: Sensor series over the window, one entry per metric/scope pair. This keeps per-zone soil-moisture history distinct instead of collapsing all zones under one metric key.

actuators.description: Actuator state samples over the window.
